official_functions.role: Construct the official Play clientbound set_border_size fixture
Write, decode, and observe the official border size body
Name the packet id assigned in Play clientbound state

invariants: The official Play clientbound table assigns set_border_size to packet id 0x5a.
The official Play clientbound protocol codec dispatches the set_border_size id to ClientboundSetBorderSizePacket.
The official set_border_size body is one border size double.
The fixture uses one primitive WorldBorder size field only and does not require initialized Level or runtime world-border state.

The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, decoded size, Play clientbound packet table, and remaining decode byte counts are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove world-border runtime behavior, world state, render readiness, or client-load completion.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer world-border runtime behavior, world state, render readiness, or client-load completion.
